name: xylo
description: Manage Meta, Google, and TikTok ads from Codex with Xylo.

interface.shortDescription: Run Meta, Google, and TikTok ads from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Connect Codex to Xylo's 300+ ad operations across Meta Ads, Google Ads, and TikTok Ads, with an embedded workflow and safety playbook.
defaultPrompt: Audit my ad accounts and prioritize the biggest opportunities.
Show me the best and worst campaigns from the last 30 days.
Build a paused campaign from my brief and existing brand knowledge.
